steps.title: Define the variables
steps.content: Let $x$ be the price of each shirt and $y$ be the price of each pair of pants.

steps.title: Write Hiro's equation
steps.content: Hiro bought $4$ shirts and $2$ pairs of pants for $86$, so his total is $$4x+2y=86.$$

steps.title: Write Sofia's equation
steps.content: Sofia bought $3$ shirts and $5$ pairs of pants for $166$, so her total is $$3x+5y=166.$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The system $4x+2y=86$ and $3x+5y=166$ matches so A is correct.
